python3 -c "
import pandas as pd, glob, os
data_dir = '/home/mrsar/protein-ag/past-published-data/disease-relevant non-inhibited'
tsv_files = glob.glob(os.path.join(data_dir, '**', 'fit.tsv'), recursive=True)
# Sample 4 diverse datasets
for f in tsv_files[::10]:
    df = pd.read_csv(f, sep='\t')
    ncols = df.shape[1]
    x0 = df.iloc[:,0]
    print(f'{f.split(\"/\")[-3]}: shape={df.shape}, x0=[{x0.min():.3g},{x0.max():.3g}]', end='')
    if ncols >= 3:
        x1 = df.iloc[:,1]
        print(f', x1=[{x1.min():.3g},{x1.max():.3g}], nuniq_x1={x1.nunique()}', end='')
    print()
"
